body:
- Moves input data loading to its own folder, outside of src.
 - Removes `SimpleNetCDF` module
 - Removes unused branches in GasConcentrations
 - Adds some type restrictions
 - Clean up some docs
title: Move data loading to its own folder

body:
- Convert to Unicode
 - `gas_name` -> `gas_names` (since it's a vector of gas names)
 - Remove some unused indexes from function args
 - Add some @inbounds
 - Convert some kernels to use broadcast
title: Kaizen: Convert to unicode, remove indexes, add inbounds, use broadcast
